productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Tan Formal Shoes
description: This stylish pair in a tapered square toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It’s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for formal and semi-formal wear. You can team these with formal pants and a shirt for a well groomed look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleTapered square toe box for more comfortElasticated inserts on the sides for easy insertion and removal of the feetPadded collar for extra comfortLogo name tab embossed on the sideLeather lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceMulti-directional grooves on a textured outsole for better gripHeel for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
